overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic open-world western game showing a cowboy character walking through a misty river canyon at dawn. The character passes under a large industrial truss bridge and transitions from rocky shoreline to wading through shallow water as the morning mist clears.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty riverbank beneath large metal truss bridge

events.description: sunlight creates dramatic god rays through the morning mist

agents.ego_description: cowboy character walking steadily along the rocky riverbank toward the large bridge structure

entered.detail: massive industrial railway bridge with metal truss structure spanning the canyon overhead
volumetric fog and mist illuminated by low morning sun creating god rays
uneven gravel and stone shoreline along the water's edge
calm reflective water surface in the canyon
tall pine trees on the canyon slope

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a cowboy character walking through a misty river canyon at dawn. A massive industrial truss bridge looms overhead while morning mist creates dramatic god rays in the sunlight. The character moves steadily along the rocky riverbank with evergreen trees on the left and calm water on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open river canyon with steep rock walls

events.description: morning mist dissipates revealing clear blue sky and bright sunlight
character turns slightly right moving away from the bridge structure

agents.ego_description: continuing along the riverbank as the landscape opens up and the bridge recedes into the background

entered.detail: tall rocky canyon wall with layered sedimentary rock formations
steep rock face on the left side of the river

segments.scene_description: As the mist clears, the scene opens into a bright sunlit canyon. The large bridge moves to the left and eventually passes out of view behind the character. Steep rock cliffs rise on both sides of the river as the character continues walking along the gravel shore, with the water now directly ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow river canyon with water walking

events.description: character steps from rocky shore into the shallow river water
environment transitions to enclosed canyon narrows with water filling the canyon floor

agents.ego_description: wading through the shallow river water between the canyon walls, moving deeper into the canyon

entered.detail: clear shallow water with visible stones and pebbles on the river bottom

segments.scene_description: The character steps off the rocky shore and into the shallow river water, transitioning from land to water walking. The canyon narrows around the character with steep rock walls on both sides. The water is clear and shallow, revealing the rocky riverbed beneath as the character wades deeper into the canyon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a misty river canyon that gradually opens into a bright, sunlit waterway. It begins with a cowboy walking along a rocky riverbank under a massive industrial truss bridge, where morning mist creates dramatic god rays among the evergreen trees. As the mist clears and the lighting brightens, the bridge recedes behind the character while the landscape expands to reveal steep rock cliffs rising on both sides of the gravel shore. The scene then shifts as the character steps off the land and into the clear, shallow river, transitioning from a walk on the bank to wading through the water. Finally, the canyon narrows around the character, revealing the rocky riverbed beneath the surface as they move deeper into the gorge.
